description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house surrounded by a dense perimeter of tall deciduous trees, creating a private and secluded atmosphere. The house features a flat roof with multiple skylights and rooftop elements, and a mix of gray and white exterior walls. Large windows are distributed across the facade, allowing for ample natural light, while a green lawn or terrace area is visible on one side. The property is enclosed by a fence, and the main entrance is set back from the street, partially obscured by the trees. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, surrounded by tall trees and a perimeter fence, featuring a minimalist design and a private, green setting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a clear view of the flat roof and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back facade, rooftop features, and dense tree coverage along the property line.
description_view_2: Side view with a focus on the symmetrical window arrangement and the green terrace or lawn area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, rooftop elements, and the continuous tree barrier.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is recessed and partially obscured by trees, featuring a simple door with minimal ornamentation and no visible porch or columns.
